sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71204" key="nuktime/dousa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτῐ-μέδουσα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ruling by night,</tr_> of the moon, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cat.Cod. Astr.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.173</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
